scenarios.name: Express endpoint accepting images and PDFs to S3
scenarios.rationale: Treatment validates by magic bytes (0xFF 0xD8 0xFF for JPEG, 0x25 0x50 0x44 0x46 for PDF), streams instead of buffering, uses a {type}/{userId}/{fileId}/{filename} storage key, and creates a files row with the documented status enum; baseline trusted multer's mimetype and let multer buffer to disk.

scenarios.name: Large video uploads (up to 2GB) bypassing the server
scenarios.rationale: Treatment exposes the documented /api/files/multipart/init and /api/files/multipart/complete endpoints with presigned parts and tracks status through the uploading -> uploaded -> processing -> processed enum; baseline returned a single presigned PUT URL with no multipart or status tracking.
